behavior: Prefer Runtime/Desktop/python/python.exe for commissioning with legacy env/python fallback.
Expose Runtime/Desktop/site-packages and Runtime/Core/site-packages only to the portable commissioning runtime.
Probe portable, legacy, venv, and host Python with explicit separated environments.
Use the portable Desktop runtime first for FOXAI WebUI and Desktop readiness.
Report an external .venv portability warning only when that venv is the selected Desktop runtime.
Do not let an unused external .venv downgrade a verified portable result.
Report PORTABLE_READY, HOST_ASSISTED_READY, or NEEDS_ATTENTION as runtime_mode.
Preserve read-only, no-install, no-repair, and no-auto-launch commissioning behavior.
